body.title: Igor response truncation — find and fix mid-sentence cutoff
body.result: Root cause found: PROC_RESP_AUTO_366B2A habit seeded by output_trainer with trigger 'talking akien relationship operator message akien' — fired on every Akien web message. Fixed output_trainer._extract_trigger to strip TALKING WITH/Web message prefix before keyword extraction. Added metadata tokens to stopwords. Deleted bad habit from live DB. 5 new tests.
body.description: Igor responses are being truncated mid-sentence (observed: long self-assessment cut off at prefrontal cortex narration). Root cause unknown — candidates: OR max_tokens limit, channel message size cap, bridge truncation. Diagnose where the ceiling is, raise or handle gracefully.
